name: Share Quest Panel
description: Post-conversion referral and sharing panel that turns supporter sharing into unlock progress without leaving the campaign tone.

referral-quest.description: Quest-style share panel with referral link, unlock progress, share buttons, and next reward.

slots.share-buttons: Email, social, copy, and message actions.
slots.next-unlock: Reward, queue jump, sticker, bonus content, or beta wave unlocked by sharing.

waitlist-rank.description: Waitlist rank and referral tracker with queue position, invite count, and access-wave unlock.

slots.rank-counter: Current queue rank or access wave.

visual_brief: A post-conversion panel that feels like a reward quest. It should make the supporter feel done and give them one clear next action: share to unlock or invite. Keep the referral link copyable, progress visible, and next unlock understandable. Avoid manipulative urgency or dark-pattern sharing.

responsive.mobile: Stack success, referral link, progress, and share buttons. Share buttons should use recognizable icons plus labels.
responsive.tablet: Two-column layout with success/progress beside share actions.
responsive.desktop: Centered console with referral link and progress as the primary focus.

layout_hints.post_conversion: Lead with confirmation before asking for sharing.
layout_hints.clarity: Show exactly what sharing unlocks and how many referrals remain.
layout_hints.controls: Use copy and share icons inside accessible labeled buttons.

micro.copy-success: link field flashes success color and button label changes briefly
micro.progress-increment: progress track fills one segment per referral

keyboard: Referral link copy button should be reachable immediately after the link field.
Share buttons should include text labels, not icons only.
